transitions.name: Fade In
transitions.implementation_note: Interpolate alpha over time; MoviePy CompositeVideoClip with TextClip mask or PIL text layer; easing with numpy.

transitions.name: Fade Out
transitions.implementation_note: Reverse alpha interpolation.

transitions.name: Cross Dissolve Text
transitions.description: One text layer dissolves into another.
transitions.implementation_note: Render two text layers and crossfade alpha curves.

transitions.name: Hard Cut Title
transitions.description: Instant title appearance with no interpolation.
transitions.implementation_note: Place TextClip on timeline with no transition.

transitions.name: Dip to Black Title
transitions.description: Text fades through a black background.
transitions.implementation_note: Add black ColorClip underneath; fade text/background opacity.

transitions.name: Dip to White Title
transitions.description: Text flashes or fades through white.
transitions.implementation_note: Composite white ColorClip during transition.

transitions.name: Blur Fade In
transitions.description: Text starts blurred and transparent, then sharpens.
transitions.implementation_note: Use PIL/OpenCV GaussianBlur decreasing radius while alpha increases.

transitions.name: Blur Fade Out
transitions.description: Text blurs away as it fades.
transitions.implementation_note: Increase blur radius while reducing alpha.

transitions.name: Typewriter
transitions.implementation_note: Render text substrings per frame; use PIL/ImageDraw or MoviePy TextClip.

transitions.name: Cursor Typewriter
transitions.implementation_note: Render substring plus cursor; blink with modulo frame count.

transitions.name: Backspace Delete
transitions.implementation_note: Render progressively shorter substrings.

transitions.name: Word Reveal
transitions.implementation_note: Split text on spaces and reveal tokens by timestamp.

transitions.name: Line Reveal
transitions.implementation_note: Render multiline text with per-line alpha masks.

transitions.name: Character Fade Cascade
transitions.implementation_note: Create per-character masks and stagger alpha curves.

transitions.name: Word Fade Cascade
transitions.implementation_note: Create one layer per word; stagger opacity with easing.

transitions.name: Kinetic Pop
transitions.description: Words pop into place with scale overshoot.
transitions.implementation_note: Animate scale from 0.8→1.1→1 using easing curves.

transitions.name: Bounce Text
transitions.implementation_note: Use damped sine easing on y-position.

transitions.name: Elastic Text
transitions.implementation_note: Animate x/y scale separately with overshoot.

transitions.name: Punch Zoom Title
transitions.description: Text rapidly zooms toward viewer on beat.
transitions.implementation_note: Scale text layer sharply, add motion blur with OpenCV.

transitions.name: Impact Slam
transitions.description: Text slams into frame with shake.
transitions.implementation_note: Animate y/x position fast; add random jitter for impact frames.

transitions.name: Drop In
transitions.description: Text falls from top with slight bounce.
transitions.implementation_note: Position y follows gravity-like curve; optional shadow squash.

transitions.name: Rise Up
transitions.description: Text slides upward while fading in.
transitions.implementation_note: Animate y-position and alpha.

transitions.name: Slide Left Text
transitions.description: Text slides in from right to left.
transitions.implementation_note: Move x-position from outside frame to target.

transitions.name: Slide Right Text
transitions.description: Text slides in from left to right.
transitions.implementation_note: Move x-position from outside frame to target.

transitions.name: Slide Up Text
transitions.implementation_note: Move y-position upward with easing.

transitions.name: Slide Down Text
transitions.implementation_note: Move y-position downward with easing.

transitions.name: Overshoot Slide
transitions.description: Text passes target then settles back.
transitions.implementation_note: Use cubic ease-out plus overshoot correction.

transitions.name: Spring Words
transitions.implementation_note: Stagger per-word transform with spring equation.

transitions.name: Scale Cascade
transitions.description: Letters scale in one after another.
transitions.implementation_note: Per-character layers with staggered scale.

transitions.name: Wave Text
transitions.implementation_note: Apply y-offset per character: amp*sin(freq*time + phase*i).

transitions.name: Jitter Text
transitions.implementation_note: Add small random x/y offsets per frame.

transitions.name: Shake Text
transitions.implementation_note: Random jitter amplitude decays over time.

transitions.name: Wiggle Text
transitions.description: Text position and rotation wobble smoothly.
transitions.implementation_note: Use low-frequency sine/noise for transform.

transitions.name: Spin In
transitions.implementation_note: Rotate text image layer with PIL/OpenCV affine transform.

transitions.name: Spin Out
transitions.implementation_note: Reverse spin-in with alpha drop.

transitions.name: Flip X
transitions.implementation_note: Approximate with vertical scale compression/inversion or use 3D via Blender.

transitions.name: Flip Y
transitions.implementation_note: Approximate with horizontal scale compression/inversion.

transitions.name: 3D Rotate Title
transitions.implementation_note: Use OpenCV perspective transform or Blender for true 3D.

transitions.name: Orbit Text
transitions.description: Words orbit around a center point.
transitions.implementation_note: Position word layers using polar coordinates over time.

transitions.name: Circular Text Motion
transitions.implementation_note: Compute x/y along circle; optional rotate tangent.

transitions.name: Linear Wipe Reveal
transitions.description: Text is revealed by a straight moving mask.
transitions.implementation_note: Create alpha mask rectangle moving across text image.

transitions.name: Left Wipe
transitions.description: Text reveals from left to right.
transitions.implementation_note: Animate mask width.

transitions.name: Right Wipe
transitions.description: Text reveals from right to left.
transitions.implementation_note: Animate mask origin/width.

transitions.name: Top Wipe
transitions.implementation_note: Animate vertical mask height.

transitions.name: Bottom Wipe
transitions.implementation_note: Animate vertical mask.

transitions.name: Split Reveal
transitions.implementation_note: Two masks expand from center.

transitions.name: Center Slice Reveal
transitions.description: Text opens from a thin central strip.
transitions.implementation_note: Scale a center mask outward.

transitions.name: Circle Reveal
transitions.description: Circular mask expands to show text.
transitions.implementation_note: Draw expanding ellipse mask with PIL.

transitions.name: Radial Reveal
transitions.implementation_note: Generate polar angle mask with numpy.

transitions.name: Diagonal Wipe
transitions.implementation_note: Use slanted polygon mask moving across frame.

transitions.name: Venetian Blinds
transitions.description: Text appears through multiple horizontal strips.
transitions.implementation_note: Animate multiple stripe masks.

transitions.name: Vertical Blinds
transitions.implementation_note: Animate column masks.

transitions.name: Shutter Reveal
transitions.description: Multiple panels open to expose text.
transitions.implementation_note: Animate rectangular panel masks.

transitions.name: Box Reveal
transitions.implementation_note: Animate rectangle mask dimensions.

transitions.name: Frame Reveal
transitions.description: Border draws first, then text appears.
transitions.implementation_note: Animate line drawing with OpenCV, then alpha fade text.

transitions.name: Ink Matte Reveal
transitions.implementation_note: Use noise texture threshold over time.

transitions.name: Smoke Matte Reveal
transitions.implementation_note: Generate noise mask or import smoke matte video.

transitions.name: Paint Brush Reveal
transitions.implementation_note: Use brush alpha texture swept across text.

transitions.name: Scratch Reveal
transitions.implementation_note: Composite scratch mask; animate threshold.

transitions.name: Glitch Mask Reveal
transitions.description: Text appears in broken digital slices.
transitions.implementation_note: Random horizontal slice masks with staggered offsets.

transitions.name: RGB Split Text
transitions.description: Text channels separate into red, green, and blue offsets.
transitions.implementation_note: Split PIL image channels and offset each before recompositing.

transitions.name: Chromatic Aberration
transitions.implementation_note: Offset red/blue channels by a few pixels.

transitions.name: Digital Glitch Title
transitions.description: Text fragments into horizontal corrupted slices.
transitions.implementation_note: Slice image rows and offset slices randomly per frame.

transitions.name: Data Moshing Text
transitions.implementation_note: Approximate by frame blending, displacement maps, and block artifacts.

transitions.name: Pixel Sort Text
transitions.description: Text edges smear into pixel-sorted streaks.
transitions.implementation_note: Use numpy to sort pixel rows/columns based on luminance.

transitions.name: Scanline Text
transitions.implementation_note: Overlay alternating dark horizontal lines.

transitions.name: CRT Flicker
transitions.description: Text flickers like an old monitor.
transitions.implementation_note: Modulate brightness/alpha with random noise.

transitions.name: VHS Title
transitions.description: Analog title with noise, scanlines, color bleed.
transitions.implementation_note: Use OpenCV noise, blur, RGB shift, rolling bands.

transitions.name: Bad Signal
transitions.description: Text is interrupted by signal noise.
transitions.implementation_note: Random horizontal displacement, static overlay, frame drops.

transitions.name: Terminal Text
transitions.implementation_note: Use typewriter plus terminal styling.

transitions.name: Matrix Rain Behind Text
transitions.description: Falling code behind or through title.
transitions.implementation_note: Generate random glyph columns with PIL.

transitions.name: Hacker Decode
transitions.description: Random characters resolve into final text.
transitions.implementation_note: Per-character random glyph cycling until reveal time.

transitions.name: Binary Decode
transitions.implementation_note: Render 0/1 substitutions per character until locked.

transitions.name: HUD Text
transitions.description: Futuristic interface title with lines and labels.
transitions.implementation_note: Use PIL/OpenCV vector lines, monospaced text, animated masks.

transitions.name: Cyberpunk Neon Glitch
transitions.description: Neon title with RGB glitches and flicker.
transitions.implementation_note: Glow via blurred duplicates; add RGB split and flicker.

transitions.name: Pixelated Reveal
transitions.description: Text starts blocky and resolves sharp.
transitions.implementation_note: Downscale/upscale text layer with decreasing pixel size.

transitions.name: Block Corruption
transitions.implementation_note: Tile text image and randomly shift/replace blocks.

transitions.name: Glitch Flash
transitions.description: Text appears with brief corrupted flash.
transitions.implementation_note: Add frames of RGB split, inversion, slice offsets.

transitions.name: Static Noise Fill
transitions.implementation_note: Mask animated noise texture inside text alpha.

transitions.name: Digital Tear
transitions.description: Text tears horizontally across a scanline.
transitions.implementation_note: Displace upper/lower image segments differently.

transitions.name: Wave Distortion
transitions.implementation_note: Use sinusoidal displacement map on text image.

transitions.name: Heat Haze Text
transitions.implementation_note: Use animated noise displacement and slight blur.

transitions.name: Liquid Ripple
transitions.implementation_note: Radial displacement with sine falloff.

transitions.name: Magnify Text
transitions.implementation_note: Apply local warp around moving circle.

transitions.name: Bulge Text
transitions.implementation_note: Use OpenCV remap with radial displacement.

transitions.name: Pinch Text
transitions.implementation_note: Inverse radial displacement.

transitions.name: Twirl Text
transitions.implementation_note: Map polar angle offset based on radius.

transitions.name: Stretch Text
transitions.implementation_note: Animate non-uniform scale.

transitions.name: Smear Text
transitions.description: Text smears in direction of motion.
transitions.implementation_note: Blend shifted copies with decaying alpha.

transitions.name: Echo Trails
transitions.implementation_note: Composite delayed copies with decreasing alpha.

transitions.name: Motion Blur Text
transitions.implementation_note: Convolve alpha/image with linear kernel in movement direction.

transitions.name: Zoom Blur Text
transitions.implementation_note: Accumulate scaled copies or use radial blur approximation.

transitions.name: Broken Glass Text
transitions.implementation_note: Triangulate mask into polygons; move/rotate shards individually.

transitions.name: Paper Tear Text
transitions.description: Text tears apart along jagged seam.
transitions.implementation_note: Generate jagged mask; move halves apart.

transitions.name: Pixel Melt
transitions.implementation_note: Move columns/particles downward based on random/noise.

transitions.name: Sand Dissolve
transitions.implementation_note: Sample text mask pixels into particles; animate outward/downward.

transitions.name: Particle Disperse
transitions.implementation_note: Use mask pixel sampling; animate particles with numpy.

transitions.name: Ash Disintegration
transitions.implementation_note: Edge burn mask plus particles drifting upward.

transitions.name: Fragment Explosion
transitions.implementation_note: Tile/contour text mask; animate pieces radially.

transitions.name: Magnetic Assemble
transitions.implementation_note: Reverse particle disperse animation.

transitions.name: Neon Glow Text
transitions.implementation_note: Render text stroke; blur duplicates with additive blend.

transitions.name: Neon Flicker
transitions.implementation_note: Random alpha/brightness modulation.

transitions.name: Light Sweep
transitions.implementation_note: Moving gradient clipped to text alpha.

transitions.name: Glow Pulse
transitions.implementation_note: Animate blur radius and opacity of glow layer.

transitions.name: Aura Text
transitions.implementation_note: Create blurred alpha mask behind text.

transitions.name: Laser Scan Text
transitions.description: Laser line scans and reveals title.
transitions.implementation_note: Animate thin bright line and trailing glow.

transitions.name: Hologram Text
transitions.description: Semi-transparent text with scanlines and shimmer.
transitions.implementation_note: Alpha modulation, scanlines, RGB shift.

transitions.name: Projected Light Text
transitions.description: Text appears as projected light on surface.
transitions.implementation_note: Perspective transform, blend mode screen, blur/noise.

transitions.name: Spotlight Text
transitions.implementation_note: Circular/elliptical light mask moves over text.

transitions.name: Shadow Cast Title
transitions.implementation_note: Duplicate text mask offset/blurred; create long-shadow by repeated offsets.

transitions.name: Gold Shine
transitions.implementation_note: Animate gradient highlight over masked text.

transitions.name: Chrome Shine
transitions.implementation_note: Use multi-stop gradient fill and moving highlight.

transitions.name: Fire Glow
transitions.implementation_note: Glow layer in warm tones; add noise flicker.

transitions.name: Electric Outline
transitions.implementation_note: Draw jittery outline paths; animate noise/brightness.

transitions.name: Lightning Text
transitions.implementation_note: Generate jagged polylines between points; composite glow.

transitions.name: Strobe Title
transitions.implementation_note: Alternate alpha/brightness per beat/frame.

transitions.name: Flash Frame Title
transitions.description: Title appears in a white flash.
transitions.implementation_note: Add white ColorClip overlay around text intro.

transitions.name: Lens Dust Sparkle
transitions.implementation_note: Particle dots with random twinkle alpha.

transitions.name: Star Sparkle Text
transitions.implementation_note: Place animated sparkle sprites near text bounding box/mask edge.

transitions.name: Bokeh Text
transitions.description: Text sits over animated bokeh lights.
transitions.implementation_note: Generate blurred circles moving slowly behind/inside text.
